# Pull Request

## Notice

Jeerah is a closed-source commercial project.

Pull requests are only accepted for public documentation updates if explicitly approved.

Do not submit source code, database schema, backend logic, pricing logic, payment implementation, trip-pooling logic, API keys, secrets, or private business rules.

---

## Type of Change

- [ ] Documentation correction
- [ ] Broken link fix
- [ ] Typo fix
- [ ] Public diagram improvement
- [ ] Other public-safe update

---

## Checklist

- [ ] This PR does not include source code.
- [ ] This PR does not include secrets.
- [ ] This PR does not include database schema.
- [ ] This PR does not include payment logic.
- [ ] This PR does not include trip-pooling logic.
- [ ] This PR does not include real user data.
- [ ] This PR is safe for a public showcase repository.
